transcript_segment:
Agent: Magandang araw po! May reminder po kami about your premium payment.
Customer: Ah oo, yung sa insurance ko. Magkano ba yung premium ko this month?
localization_examples: Natural Taglish code-switching with insurance terms in English

objection: Hindi ko pa kayang magbayad ngayon, pwede ba next month na lang?
expected_response_language: Filipino with insurance terms in English
notes: Response should use Filipino naturally, not translate English verbatim

transcript_segment: Agent: Selamat pagi Ibu. Kami ingin mengingatkan bahwa cicilan Anda sebesar Rp 2.500.000 akan jatuh tempo pada tanggal 20 Februari.
Customer: Gimana ya, DP udah lunas tapi cicilan bulan ini belum bisa bayar. Bisa minta perpanjangan tenor nggak?
localization_examples: 'DP' (Down Payment) as English loanword used naturally
